data_visibility.description: Rules for what data is visible to different users

internal_reference_only.description: These fields are for INTERNAL REFERENCE ONLY - never shown to customers

super_admin_only.description: These fields are visible ONLY to Super Admin users
super_admin_only.reason: Cost prices are sensitive business information

supplier_product_matching.description: Rules for matching synced products from extension to database products
supplier_product_matching.important: Supplier Product Name and Supplier Code are for INTERNAL REFERENCE ONLY

dual_matching.description: Products are matched using BOTH code AND name for reliability
priority_order: 1. original_supplier_code - Website/URL code from extension sync (e.g., P14461)
2. supplier_code - Spreadsheet code (same as original_supplier_code for Verona)
3. name - Supplier Product Name (exact match, then partial)
dual_matching.rationale: If supplier changes product names, code still matches. If code format changes, name matches.

fields.original_supplier_code: Code extracted by matching Supplier Product Name to spreadsheet
fields.name: Supplier Product Name (for internal reference)

product_naming.description: Product names MUST follow the strict format: UNIQUE_NAME + COLOUR + SIZE + FINISH + TYPE
examples: Munich Light Grey 600x600 Matt Wall & Floor Tile
Cannes Dark Grey 300x600 Polished Wall & Floor Tile
Amazon Light Blue 130x130 Gloss Wall Tile

unique_name_rules.description: Each product SERIES gets ONE unique name (city/place for tiles, forest/landscape for flooring)
unique_name_rules.regular_products: Use city/place names (e.g., Munich, Cannes, Tokyo, Lima)
unique_name_rules.flooring_products: Use forest/landscape names (e.g., Sherwood, Redwood, Alpine)
unique_name_rules.no_duplicates: Names must NOT be duplicated or have numeric suffixes
unique_name_rules.one_per_series: All products in a series share the SAME unique name

colour_rules.description: ALWAYS preserve the FULL colour variant from the original supplier name
colour_rules.important: Do NOT simplify colours - use the exact colour variant

sku_generation.description: SKU format: TS + Supplier Initial + First char of original SKU + Last 5 digits

pricing_calculation.description: List prices calculated from cost price with markup and VAT

fields.in_stock: Boolean - true if either stock value > 0

supplier_code_mapping.description: Extracted from Verona spreadsheet - maps Supplier Product Name to Supplier Code
supplier_code_mapping.note: All 594 Verona products in database now have original_supplier_code set from this spreadsheet

series_unique_names.description: Mapping of original supplier series names to unique names

production_first.description: USER ALWAYS WORKS IN PRODUCTION APP
rules: All fixes and changes must work in production
Testing in preview environment is NOT sufficient
User tests on production, not preview
Always verify fixes work in the PRODUCTION context

debugging_protocol.description: MANDATORY: When investigating ANY issue, ALWAYS check PRODUCTION first
rules: NEVER rely on preview environment data for debugging - it has different/empty data
Always query PRODUCTION API directly to see real data and real issues
Use curl to hit production endpoints: curl -s 'https://tile-station-production.up.railway.app/api/...'
Compare production API responses with what user sees in screenshots
Preview environment is ONLY for testing code changes, NOT for data verification
If numbers don't match, query production database/API to understand the actual data structure
